about.name: Diogo Henrique Moreira da Silva
about.bio: I am a Software Engineering student at PUC Minas with an interest in systems development, technology, and building digital solutions.

jobs.description: Administrative support in a real estate company, assisting with document organization, monitoring property-related processes, analyzing registry and property data, and supporting operational and strategic activities. Experience with data organization, support in negotiations, and management of information related to properties and development projects.

education.description: Bachelor's degree in Software Engineering focused on systems development, programming, software architecture, and requirements engineering.

projects.title: Booktrade
projects.description: Platform for buying, selling, and trading books. Static website.

projects.title: Gear Up
projects.description: The GearUp project aims to simplify the management of automotive services through an intuitive and efficient web platform. The application allows customers to register their vehicles, schedule services easily, and track the progress of their services in real time. Employees can also register services, view schedules, update service status, and save notes related to appointments.

projects.title: Athenas Buffet
projects.description: Website for ordering and managing buffet services.

contact.message: Open to internship opportunities and projects in Backend, Frontend, and Software Engineering.
